calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2021 Off Calendar

Plintiff Travelers Property Casualty Company Of Americas Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant TEX-Q-EXPRESS Inc., a corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Joshua A. Southwick, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Travelers Property Casualty Company of America, a corporation.
Carey Stebbins, Claims Representative for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Southwick and Ms. Stebbins appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant TEX-Q-EXPRESS Inc., a corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Bailment & Negligence was filed on April 2, 2019.
Proof of Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents via Certified Mail, Return Receipt Required, was filed with the Clerk's Office on May 17, 2019.
Default as to defendant TEX-Q-EXPRESS Inc., a corporation, was entered on September 3, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 22, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Travelers Property Casualty Company of America, a corporation, and against the defaulted defendant TEX-Q-EXPRESS Inc., a corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,110.95.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,303.60.
Costs - $450.00.

Total - $36,864.55.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
